lines.speaker: Dex
lines.text: I was reviewing your schedule. You've been running back-to-back without recovery days.

lines.speaker: Dex
lines.text: I came to adjust your calendar, not... whatever this is.

lines.speaker: Dex
lines.text: I'm staying for exactly thirty minutes.
He stays for two hours. Neither of you opens a calendar.

lines.speaker: Dex
lines.text: For what it's worth — I think you're doing better than you think you are.
He leaves. The calendar on your phone has a new block: 'No meetings today.' He must have added it on the way out.
